data.title: IRESS Clears Over 1.9 Million Lapsed Equity Incentives From Capital Structure
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from IRESS Limited ( (AU:IRE) ) is now available.

IRESS Limited has notified the market that a series of equity-based incentive instruments, including share appreciation rights, performance rights, deferred share rights and options, have lapsed as of 31 March 2026 because their vesting or performance conditions were not met or became incapable of being satisfied. The cessation of these 1.9 million-plus rights and options reduces potential future share dilution for existing shareholders and may signal that prior performance or service hurdles set under the company’s employee incentive plans were not achieved, with implications for how future remuneration and incentive structures are calibrated.

The lapsing of over 686,000 share appreciation rights, more than 632,000 performance rights, 1,246 deferred share rights and 575,225 options streamlines IRESS’s capital structure by removing unvested contingent equity from its issued capital profile. Stakeholders in the company’s remuneration and governance framework will note that these outcomes can affect employee alignment with shareholder returns and may prompt a reassessment of performance targets, plan design, or communication around incentive expectations in coming periods.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:IRE) stock is a Buy with a A$11.52 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IRESS Limited stock, see the AU:IRE Stock Forecast page.

More about IRESS Limited

IRESS Limited is an Australia-listed technology company that provides software and services to the financial services industry. Its platforms typically support trading, market data, wealth management, financial advice, and related operations for financial institutions and professionals across various markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,048,234

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$1.26B

data.title: Seeka lifts profit, cuts debt and expands capacity on strong kiwifruit season
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Seeka Limited ( (NZ:SEK) ) is now available.

Seeka reported a strong 2025 financial year, delivering record profit and earnings as revenue rose 7% to $440m and EBITDA climbed 26% to $96m, driven by higher kiwifruit volumes and improved performance across all business units. Net profit after tax surged to $32m, returns on capital improved to 14.5%, and the company sharply reduced net bank debt while lifting dividends, underscoring a focus on balance sheet strength and enhanced shareholder returns.

Operationally, Seeka’s orchard and post-harvest segments grew kiwifruit production and packing volumes by about 10%, benefited from better yields, and accelerated automation investments, including new Reemoon packing lines for kiwifruit and citrus. Its Australian and retail services businesses also expanded volumes and earnings, and management signalled the group is well prepared for the 2026 kiwifruit harvest with added capacity and cost efficiencies, reinforcing its competitive position in New Zealand’s produce supply chain.

More about Seeka Limited

Seeka Limited is a New Zealand-based agribusiness that grows, processes and supplies fresh produce to domestic and international consumers, with a core focus on kiwifruit alongside avocados, pears, nashi, citrus and other specialty fruits. The company operates an orchard-to-market model, providing orcharding and post-harvest infrastructure services, as well as retail and Australian produce operations to secure sustainable volumes and diverse revenue streams.

Average Trading Volume: 30,242

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: N$200.2M

data.title: MindBio Hires Venture Liquidity Providers to Support Market Making on CSE
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mindbio Therapeutics Corp. ( (TSE:MBIO) ) has provided an announcement.

MindBio Therapeutics has engaged Venture Liquidity Providers to act as a market maker for its common shares on the Canadian Securities Exchange, with services executed through registered broker W.D. Latimer Co. Ltd. Under the 12‑month agreement, MindBio will pay VLP a monthly fee, while VLP and the company remain at arm’s length and W.D. Latimer supplies the capital and stock needed to support orderly trading.

The move is aimed at improving liquidity and maintaining a more stable trading environment for MindBio’s securities as it advances its AI voice‑based intoxication detection platform. Enhanced market making could support investor confidence and access to capital, reinforcing the company’s positioning in the emerging niche of AI-enabled safety and compliance technologies.

More about Mindbio Therapeutics Corp.

MindBio Therapeutics Corp. is a biotechnology company focused on commercializing AI-driven voice analytics to detect drug and alcohol intoxication. Its prediction model leverages more than 50 million data points to assess alcohol impairment with high accuracy using the human voice, and it is building an enterprise platform with Edge-AI kiosks for safety-critical sectors such as mining, aviation, construction and law enforcement.

Average Trading Volume: 12,836

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$5.27M

For a thorough assessment of MBIO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: a2 Milk discloses late notice of director share sale via KiwiSaver
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

a2 Milk Company ( (ACOPF) ) has provided an update.

The a2 Milk Company has disclosed a change in director Philippa (Pip) Greenwood’s relevant interests after an automatic sale of 287 shares held through a KiwiSaver scheme. The company acknowledged the disclosure was filed late because the sale, executed on 5 March 2026 to cover scheme management fees, occurred without Greenwood’s knowledge.

The company said measures have been taken to prevent similar automatic trades affecting Greenwood’s holdings in future. It also confirmed that arrangements are in place with all directors to ensure timely provision of information required for compliance with ASX director interest disclosure rules.

More about a2 Milk Company

The a2 Milk Company Limited is a dairy nutrition company listed on both the NZX and ASX, focused on producing and marketing dairy products that contain only the A2 type beta-casein protein. The business targets consumers seeking perceived digestive and health benefits from specialized milk and infant nutrition products across key Asia-Pacific markets.

data.title: Couche-Tard Launches €750 Million Euro Senior Notes to Refinance Debt
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc ( (TSE:ATD) ).

Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc. has priced a €750 million private offering of euro-denominated senior unsecured notes due 2033, carrying a 3.901% annual coupon and sold at par. The notes, expected to close around April 21, 2026, will be direct unsecured obligations ranking pari passu with the company’s other senior unsecured debt and guaranteed by certain wholly owned subsidiaries.

Couche-Tard plans to use the net proceeds primarily to repay existing indebtedness, including refinancing its euro notes maturing in May 2026, and to cover related fees and expenses. The securities will be placed with qualified institutional and non-retail investors in the U.S., Europe, the UK and Canada under various private placement exemptions, underscoring the company’s reliance on institutional debt markets to optimize its capital structure and extend its debt maturity profile.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ATD) stock is a Buy with a C$95.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc stock, see the TSE:ATD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ATD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ATD is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong revenue and free-cash-flow generation) tempered by increased leverage and thin net margins. Earnings-call commentary was broadly positive with clear operating momentum, while technicals are mixed-to-soft near term and valuation support is limited by a higher P/E and modest yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ATD stock, click here.

More about Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc

Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc. is a Canada-based operator of convenience stores and fuel retail sites, best known for banners such as Circle K. The company focuses on convenience retailing and fuel distribution across North America and Europe, using the debt capital markets to support its growth strategy and manage its global funding needs.

Average Trading Volume: 1,581,059

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$71.47B

data.title: Lode Resources Highlights High-Grade Critical Metals Advances in NSW and Tasmania
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Lode Resources Ltd ( (AU:LDR) ) has shared an update.

Lode Resources has outlined its growing portfolio of high-grade critical metals projects, highlighting standout drill intercepts from the Montezuma Silver & Antimony Deposit in Tasmania and the Magwood Antimony Deposit in New South Wales. The presentation consolidates recent exploration milestones across its silver, antimony, gold and tin prospects, signalling a strategic push to advance multiple high-grade deposits in top-tier Australian mining regions and potentially strengthen its position in the critical metals supply chain.

The company also reiterates its use of metal-equivalent grades at Montezuma, based on recent commodity prices and metallurgical recoveries, to better convey overall metal endowment. By referencing a series of market announcements from 2024 to early 2026, Lode underscores sustained exploration momentum, project acquisitions and divestments, suggesting a deliberate portfolio refinement towards high-grade, strategically important critical metal assets.

More about Lode Resources Ltd

Lode Resources Ltd is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on critical metals, including antimony, silver, gold and tin. The company operates in tier-one mining jurisdictions in New South Wales and Tasmania, with key projects such as the Montezuma Silver & Antimony Deposit in Tasmania and the Magwood Antimony Deposit in New South Wales.

Average Trading Volume: 340,946

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Greatland Resources ( (GB:GGP) ) has shared an update.

Greatland Resources Limited has notified the market of a change in its issued capital following the lapse of 49,063 performance rights. The rights, identified under the ASX security code GGPAD, ceased on 31 March 2026 because the conditions attached to them were not met or could no longer be satisfied.

The cessation of these conditional securities marginally reduces the company’s pool of potential future equity dilution tied to performance incentives. This adjustment to Greatland Resources’ capital structure may reflect performance outcomes against pre-set targets and provides investors with updated transparency on the company’s outstanding equity-based instruments.

More about Greatland Resources

Greatland Resources Limited is an Australia-based company listed on the ASX under the code GGP. The company operates in the resources sector, with its capital structure including performance rights and other equity-based securities as part of its remuneration or incentive arrangements.

data.description:

Percheron Therapeutics ( (AU:PER) ) has shared an update.

Percheron Therapeutics Limited has notified the market of the issue of 86,015,884 unquoted options, exercisable until April 15, 2028, under the ASX code PERAQ. These options, which are not intended to be quoted on the ASX, form part of previously announced transactions and signal a significant expansion of the company’s unquoted equity base that may influence future dilution, incentive structures and capital flexibility for existing stakeholders.

The new options are being issued as part of earlier-disclosed arrangements and do not represent a new capital raising in themselves. By increasing its pool of unquoted options, Percheron Therapeutics is reinforcing its ability to manage long-term incentives and potential future equity conversion, which could affect ownership distribution and align management or counterparties with the company’s longer-term performance.

More about Percheron Therapeutics

Percheron Therapeutics Limited is an ASX-listed company in the life sciences sector, focused on developing therapeutic products.
